title: Usopp Cannot Accept the Merry’s Fate
main_description: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
key_events: Usopp Cannot Accept the Merry’s Fate
Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
